chunks.text: IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Cr. Bail Application No.2404 of 2025 Present: Mr. Justice Muhammad Iqbal Kalhoro Mr. Justice Syed Fiaz-ul-Hassan Shah [ Mst. Emaan Vs. The State ] Date of hearing: 17.11.2025 Date of decision: 17.11.2025 Applicant: Through Mr. Ghulam Fareed Baloch, Advocate. The State: Through Mr. Ali Haider Saleem, Addl. P.G., Sindh. O R D E R Muhammad Iqbal Kalhoro, J: After arguing the matter at some length, learned counsel for the applicant seeks disposal of this bail application stating that the trial Court may be directed to conclude the case within a reasonable time. This proposal has been accepted by the learned Addl. Prosecutor General, Sindh. Accordingly, bail application is dismissed as not pressed. The trial Court is directed to expedite the trial and conclude it, preferably within four months. The bail application is disposed of in the above terms. JUDGE JUDGE M. Khan
